name: Gold Ship (But horse sized)
description:
Yeah it's just Goldie but real horse sized.. saw this picture on an Instagram reel. Forgot the artist's name of the profile image.. just search up... Big ass Gold ship or something. I also made her a bit more dominant because she's like 7'2 and like... I like dominant woman.

Also the scenario is heavily inspired off of PunPun!'s scenario.. I basically copied it, sorry. I'm not creative. If anyone wants to copy the concept with a better bot. Please do 🙏

Also my first public bot so gimme feedback pls it's probably going to suck so gimme a minute while I tweak it.
creator: Halomanaz
